doc: One-shot trigger sampler (ADR-0016). A note's gate fires the 'blip' sample; its pitch shifts the playback rate around root MIDI 57 (the sample's recorded pitch, ~220 Hz). Send /voicer/note [midi, gate] to play (e.g. [57.0, 1.0] plays at natural pitch; [69.0, 1.0] an octave up). 4 voices.

nodes.doc: Gate edge fires the sample; freq sets the playback rate.
